name: Tarte Aux Pommes a La Solognote
recipeIngredient: 4 medium Apples, peeled, cored and chopped
1 Pate Brisee (or 1 each Pastry, puff, round, 9-inch)
recipeInstructions:
1. See recipe for Pate Brisee.
2. Heat half of the butter and oil in a skillet until hot. Add the apples and sugar, shaking to coat the apples. Add the zests and cook until the sugar caramelizes.
3. In another pan, heat the remaining butter until almost smoking and pour over the apples. Turn off the heat and cover with pate brisee pastry.
4. Bake in a 350°F oven for 7 minutes. Then turn on the heat to 500°F to brown.
5. When golden, place the pan back on the stove to glaze the bottom. Invert the tart onto a plate to serve.
